programme.title: Jungle Fever
programme.desc: New York architect (Wesley Snipes) and woman (Annabella Sciorra) make waves with biracial affair.

programme.title: Queen & Slim
programme.desc: A couple go on the run after one shoots a police officer in self-defense during a traffic stop.

programme.title: Fifty Shades of Grey
programme.desc: An inexperienced college student begins a daring affair with a controlling businessman.

programme.title: Fifty Shades Darker
programme.desc: Shadowy figures from Christian Grey's past threaten his rekindled romance with Anastasia Steele.

programme.title: Fifty Shades Freed
programme.desc: Sinister events threaten the bliss between billionaire Christian Grey and his new wife, Anastasia.

programme.title: Jarhead: Law of Return
programme.desc: A fighter pilot for the Israel Defense Forces is shot down while flying through Syrian airspace.

programme.title: Jarhead: Law of Return
programme.desc: A fighter pilot for the Israel Defense Forces is shot down while flying through Syrian airspace.

programme.title: Jarhead 2: Field of Fire
programme.desc: An officer and his team must escort a woman across war-torn Afghanistan.

programme.title: Jarhead 3: The Siege
programme.desc: Marines protecting an embassy are caught off guard when armed militants suddenly attack.

programme.title: Lone Survivor
programme.desc: Navy SEALs embark on an ill-fated mission to capture or kill a notorious al-Qaeda operative.

programme.title: Faith of Our Fathers
programme.desc: Two men meet for the first time before traveling to the Vietnam Veterans Memorial.

programme.title: My Brother's Keeper
programme.desc: Brandon's world is turned upside down when Maurice claims he is his long-lost brother.

programme.desc: IRA operative (Richard Gere) helps FBI find canny political assassin (Bruce Willis).

programme.title: Hard Target
programme.desc: Men (Lance Henriksen, Arnold Vosloo) hunt a merchant seaman (Jean-Claude Van Damme) for sport.
